MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 31, 2008: Michael Sherwood Rossoff, counsel for plaintiff Grace Chin; Lenn Cameron, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Thomas Drohan, counsel for defendant Bee Jay Garmon, who is also present.
Settlement conference is held; case is not settled. The August 4, 2008 trial date remains.
